title: FH6 Beginner Guide: Everything You Need to Know
excerpt: Everything you need to start your FH6 journey - first car, map navigation, and pro tips for new players.
content:
## Welcome to Forza Horizon 6

Forza Horizon 6 is here, and it is bigger than ever. Whether you are a veteran or newcomer, this guide helps you hit the ground running.

### Choose Your First Car Wisely

**Top starter picks:**
- Toyota GR Supra 2025 - Best all-rounder
- Honda Civic Type R - Excellent handling
- Ford Focus RS - Perfect for mixed terrain

### Pro Tips
1. Complete the intro festival before exploring
2. Save credits for a second car
3. Join a club early for bonus XP
author: FH6 Guide Team

title: Best Starter Cars in Forza Horizon 6
excerpt: Our picks for the best starter cars in FH6 across all classes - from budget-friendly to high-performance.
content:
## Best Starter Cars

### S1 Class
- Porsche 911 GT3 RS - Incredible handling, great for road racing
- McLaren 570S - Balanced speed and control

### A Class
- Nissan GT-R - All-wheel drive stability
- BMW M4 - Perfect for drift and grip builds

### B Class
- Mazda MX-5 - Lightweight and fun
- Subaru BRZ - Great for learning manual tuning
author: FH6 Guide Team

title: How to Get Unlimited Credits Fast in FH6
excerpt: The fastest ways to earn credits in FH6 - from auction house flipping to festival playlist rewards.
content:
## Fast Credit Methods

### 1. Festival Playlist
Complete seasonal events for big credit payouts and exclusive cars.

### 2. Auction House
Buy low, sell high. Focus on seasonal exclusive cars.

### 3. Races
High-difficulty races with credit boost modifiers.

### 4. Wheelspins
Super Wheelspins give the best credit rewards.
author: FH6 Guide Team

title: All Barn Finds Locations Guide
excerpt: Complete guide to all Barn Find locations in FH6 - maps, tips, and the cars you will uncover.
content:
## Barn Finds Overview

There are 15 Barn Finds hidden across Mexico. Each contains a unique classic or rare car.

### Region 1: Central Valley
- 1969 Dodge Charger - Abandoned warehouse northeast of main festival
- 1998 Toyota Supra - Hidden behind a cliffside garage

### Region 2: Mountain Pass
- 1970 Plymouth Barracuda - Old mining tunnel entrance

### Region 3: Coastal Hills
- 1965 Ford Mustang - Beachside shack near the pier
author: FH6 Guide Team
